title: Write Comprehensive Test Suite
description: Create test suites covering: Unit tests for Rust backend functions, React component tests with Testing Library, integration tests for IPC communication, E2E tests with Playwright for critical user flows. Target 80% code coverage. Set up test CI pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: Rust unit tests for all database and IPC functions (cargo test)
React components have snapshot and interaction tests
Playwright E2E tests for: create ticket, drag-drop, spawn agent, terminal command
Code coverage reports generated and displayed in CI
Tests run on CI for all pull requests
agent_output: Basic test infrastructure with Vitest setup, Tauri API mocks, and component tests for GlassCard, StatCard, InfoCard.
